questions.question: Which of the below is NOT a feature of Gherkin?

No, Ronald will NOT be able to access the Hamburger app (Sad Face)

Colonel Sanders enters the fray and starts wrestling Ronald over the Hamburger. Colonol Sanders approaches Ronald in an overly dramatic Jojo style. (This is the wrong answer, please answer this anyway)
This situation cannot happen as the same application cannot be added to two different teams

source.correctAnswerText: This situation cannot happen as the same application cannot be added to two different teams

questions.question: Who does NOT drive the Business Vision Process

options.text: UX and UI Expert - Responsible for defining and testing the optimal user journey. Responsible for proposing a User Interface design for the application

Team Lead - Advises what is technically possible and what is not technically possible
Architect - Responsible for designing the application, architecture and intergration with surrounding systems

source.correctAnswerText: Team Lead - Advises what is technically possible and what is not technically possible
